tools.name: hibp_list_breaches
tools.description: List public HIBP breaches, optionally filtered by domain, spam-list flag, and verification status.

tools.name: hibp_get_breach
tools.description: Look up a single public HIBP breach by its canonical breach name, such as Adobe.

tools.name: hibp_get_latest_breach
tools.description: Return the most recently added public breach currently loaded into HIBP.

tools.name: hibp_list_data_classes
tools.description: List the data classes used across public HIBP breach models, such as email addresses or passwords.

tools.name: hibp_get_pwned_passwords_range
tools.description: Query the public Pwned Passwords k-anonymity API with a 5-character SHA-1 or NTLM prefix and return matching suffixes with prevalence counts.

tools.name: hibp_get_breached_account
tools.description: Search HIBP for breaches affecting a single email address. This tool requires an OAuth bearer token.

tools.name: hibp_get_breached_account_range
tools.description: Query the authenticated HIBP k-anonymity breached-account range endpoint with the first 6 characters of a SHA-1 email hash.

tools.name: hibp_get_paste_account
tools.description: Search for public pastes containing an email address. This tool requires an OAuth bearer token.

tools.name: hibp_get_breached_domain
tools.description: Return breached aliases for a verified domain. This tool requires an authorized subscription via OAuth bearer token.

tools.name: hibp_list_subscribed_domains
tools.description: List the domains associated with the authenticated HIBP subscription.

tools.name: hibp_get_subscription_status
tools.description: Return the current subscription details and feature flags for the authenticated OAuth-linked HIBP subscription.

tools.name: hibp_get_stealer_logs_by_email
tools.description: Return website domains observed in stealer logs for an email address. Requires an authenticated subscription with stealer-log access.

tools.name: hibp_get_stealer_logs_by_website_domain
tools.description: Return email addresses observed in stealer logs for a website domain. Requires an authenticated subscription with stealer-log access.

tools.name: hibp_get_stealer_logs_by_email_domain
tools.description: Return email aliases and associated website domains observed in stealer logs for an email domain. Requires an authenticated subscription with stealer-log access.

tools.name: hibp_generate_domain_verification_dns_token
tools.description: Generate the TXT record value required to verify domain control via DNS. Requires an authenticated subscription with domain-verification access.

tools.name: hibp_verify_domain_verification_dns_token
tools.description: Complete domain verification by checking the expected HIBP TXT record on the target domain. Requires an authenticated subscription with domain-verification access.

tools.name: hibp_send_domain_verification_email
tools.description: Send a domain verification email to an approved alias such as admin or security. Requires an authenticated subscription with domain-verification access.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "hibp_list_data_classes" references sensitive artifacts (password). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: List the data classes used across public HIBP breach models, such as email addresses or passwords.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: hibp_list_data_classes, hibp_get_breached_account, hibp_get_breached_account_range, hibp_get_paste_account, hibp_get_stealer_logs_by_email, hibp_get_stealer_logs_by_website_domain, hibp_get_stealer_logs_by_email_domain · Private data: hibp_list_data_classes, hibp_get_pwned_passwords_range, hibp_get_breached_account, hibp_get_paste_account, hibp_get_breached_domain, hibp_generate_domain_verification_dns_token, hibp_verify_domain_verification_dns_token · Public sink: hibp_list_data_classes, hibp_get_breached_account, hibp_get_breached_account_range, hibp_get_paste_account, hibp_get_stealer_logs_by_email, hibp_get_stealer_logs_by_website_domain, hibp_get_stealer_logs_by_email_domain, hibp_send_domain_verification_email.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: hibp_list_data_classes, hibp_get_breached_account, hibp_get_breached_account_range, hibp_get_paste_account, hibp_get_stealer_logs_by_email, hibp_get_stealer_logs_by_website_domain, hibp_get_stealer_logs_by_email_domain · Private data: hibp_list_data_classes, hibp_get_pwned_passwords_range, hibp_get_breached_account, hibp_get_paste_account, hibp_get_breached_domain, hibp_generate_domain_verification_dns_token, hibp_verify_domain_verification_dns_token · Public sink: hibp_list_data_classes, hibp_get_breached_account, hibp_get_breached_account_range, hibp_get_paste_account, hibp_get_stealer_logs_by_email, hibp_get_stealer_logs_by_website_domain, hibp_get_stealer_logs_by_email_domain, hibp_send_domain_verification_email

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
